MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-14-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-14-2013 Text Ruling

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-18-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Rita K. Johnson, Esq. of the Law Offices of Rita K. Johnson, Tel. 415.328.5256, appearing specially for plaintiff and moving party;
Greg Linn, Tel. 805.474.5678, defendant and opposing party, appearing on his own behalf via court call.

The court was given a copy of Mr. Linn's opposing declaration. The matter was argued. After arguments, the court ruled as follows: PLAINTIFF FRANCOIS FRERES USA, INC.'S Motion For Entry Of Judgment is denied with prejudice. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-11-2012 Continued To Dec-18-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF FRANCOIS FRERES USA, INC.'S Motion For Entry Of Judgment IS Continued to December 18, 2012 to give Mr. Linn the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Mr. Linn must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date no later than December 11, 2012 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. The court has courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
